violations.text: An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (toast) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. -Staff voluntarily disposed of the toast during this inspection. Staff observed wearing gloves when handling toast after disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Staff placed slicer out of commission during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The walls/ceiling in the kitchen area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Paint observed peeling and coating were chipped. -Materials for walls and ceilings in the kitchen shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2025
